title: project.yml
description: Unified project manifest schema for workspaces, services, libraries, frontends and infrastructure.

name.description: Unique project name within the workspace.

description.description: One-line description of the project's purpose.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and discovery.

projects.description: Child projects contained by this workspace.

depends_on.description: Everything this project needs to function: services, libraries, databases, caches, queues, external APIs.

environments.description: How to reach this project per environment.

projectRef.description: A reference to a child project inside a workspace.

path.description: Relative path to the project's directory.

repo.description: Fallback clone URL if the path is not present locally.

dependency.description: A single dependency — another service, a library, or an infrastructure resource.

path.description: Relative path to the project's directory. Used for service and library dependencies.

protocol.description: How this project communicates with the dependency.

environments.description: How to reach or connect to this dependency per environment.

runtime.description: How to build and run this project or dependency.

compose_service.description: Service name as it appears in docker-compose.

health_check.description: URL to poll to confirm the service is healthy.

commands.description: Named runnable commands for this project or dependency.

name.description: Command identifier, e.g. start, stop, test, lint, build.

environment.description: A deployment environment or connection target.

name.description: Unique qualifier within a type, e.g. prod-us-east.

url.description: Base URL for services, or connection string for infrastructure.

description.description: Notes, warnings, or deployment instructions for this environment.

variables.description: Map of environment variable names to their values, Vault paths, or .env references.

codeowner.description: A person or team responsible for this project.

team.description: GitHub team or organisational group, e.g. @acme/platform.

role.description: The person's role on this project, e.g. Tech Lead.

links.description: Ways to reach this person or team.

link.description: A typed contact or profile link.

type.description: Platform or channel type. Open-ended: github | slack | email | pagerduty | linear | jira | ...

value.description: The handle, URL, email address, or identifier.
